author: gb9t
content: Iter 134 result: net/sctp/sctp.md (SCTP RFC 4960 socket family - socket.c ~9720 lines; multi-streaming per-association independent stream-id ordering + multi-homing per-association multiple peer-IPs with primary+alternate-paths and heartbeat-failover + SOCK_SEQPACKET 1-to-many UDP-style + SOCK_STREAM 1-to-1 TCP-style + 4-way INIT/INIT-ACK(cookie)/COOKIE-ECHO/COOKIE-ACK handshake + DATA chunks with TSN+stream_id+ssn+payload-protocol-id + SACK selective-ack with gap-ack-blocks + per-transport PMTU + heartbeat-timer + SCTP_INITMSG/PEER_ADDR_PARAMS/RTOINFO/ASSOCINFO sockopts + SCTP_NOTIFICATION events SCTP_ASSOC_CHANGE/PEER_ADDR_CHANGE/REMOTE_ERROR/SEND_FAILED + bindx multi-IP bind + connectx + sinfo/rcvinfo/nxtinfo cmsgs + telecom signaling SS7-over-IP/Diameter/M3UA) + mm/hugetlb.md (Explicit hugetlbfs huge-pages - hugetlb.c ~7324 lines; per-hstate per-page-size {2MB, 1GB, ...} + nr_huge_pages reserved + surplus_huge_pages above-reserve + nr_overcommit_huge_pages cap + hugepage_freelists per-NUMA-node + hstate_alloc_pages boot-reserve via hugepagesz=/hugepages= cmdline + hugetlbfs filesystem + mmap MAP_HUGETLB / MAP_HUGE_2MB / MAP_HUGE_1GB + hugetlb_fault per-fault entry + hugetlb_no_page alloc-and-install + alloc_huge_page from freelist + huge_pte_alloc PMD/PUD entry + huge_pmd_share shared-PMD optim + hugetlb_reserve_pages resv_map + hugetlb_vmemmap metadata-collapse optim + hugetlb_cgroup separate accounting + /sys/kernel/mm/hugepages/<size>/{nr,free,resv,surplus,nr_overcommit}_hugepages + DPDK/SPDK/PostgreSQL/MySQL workloads). 218 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/openvswitch/datapath.md (OVS) + mm/zsmalloc.md.
